R0203.title: DApp Frontend Hijacking
R0203.definition: Attackers hijack IPFS gateways or poison DNS to tamper with DApp frontend code, replacing payment addresses or injecting malicious interactions without user awareness.
R0203.description: Attackers hijack IPFS gateways or poison DNS to tamper with DApp frontend code, replacing payment addresses or injecting malicious interactions without user awareness.
R0203.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
